nasb.text: She will pursue her lovers, but she will not overtake them; And she will seek them, but will not find them. Then she will say, ‘I will go back to my first husband, For it was better for me then than now!’

esv.text: She shall pursue her lovers but not overtake them, and she shall seek them but shall not find them. Then she shall say, ‘I will go and return to my first husband, for it was better for me then than now.’

cnv.text: 她要追趕她那些愛人，卻追不上； 要尋找他們，卻找不著。 她就說：‘我要回去，回到前夫那裡， 因為從前比現在好得多了。’

ccb.text: 她要追随情人，却追不上； 寻找情人，却找不到。 于是，她说，‘我倒不如回到丈夫身边， 我从前的光景比现在还好。’
